titleStmt.title: SII 41.40: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 40. (A.R. No. 39 of 1905.) Perumukkal, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Mukhyāchalēśvara temple on the hill

summary.p: Records a gift of 32 cows and a bull, for a lamp to the deity Tiruvānmīśvaram-uḍaiyār on the top of the hill at Perumukkil by Kūttu-kantāḷ, daughter of Nachchi, belonging to the parigraham of Kūṟṟūr in Tiruviḍaikaḻi-nāḍu. Perumukkil alias Gaṅkaikoṇḍachōḻa-nallūr was included in Ōymā-nāḍu alias Vijaiyarājēndra-vaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kaṭal cūḻnta pārmātaruñ cirmātarum vantu vāḻka nāṟ
kaṭalcūḻ puviyeḻum pāṟkaṭal poṟ pukaḻparappi Āti
yukam Āmennac cotimuṭikavittaruḷit teṉṉavarum
ceralarum ciṅkaḷarum mutalāya maṉnavarkaḷ tiraikuṇa
ntu vantiṇṭic cevippa vāḻi Ūḻiceṅkol
Eḻupārum Iṉitaḷippa cempoṉ virasimhāsaṉa
ttu Ulakuṭaimukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya
kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac śakravattikaḷ śrīrājā
tirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 5vatu [per?]nāyaṟṟu jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Oymāṉāṭāṉa vijarājentra
vaḷanāṭṭu perumukkilāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭa nallūr tiru
malaimel Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvāṉmiśvaramuṭaiya mahāde
vaṟku coḻamaṇṭalattu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu tiru
viṭaikkaḻināṭṭuk kūṟṟūrp parikkirakattu nācci ma
kaḷ kūttukantāḷen vaiytta tirunun=tāviḷakkoṉṟuk
ku viṭṭa pacu 3 10 2 Iṣapa Erutu Onṟu kaikoṇṭu can=tirātit
tavarai Ittirunun=tāviḷakoṉṟuñ celuttak kaṭavomā
ka kaiy koṇṭom Ikkoyilil śivabrahmaṇarom Itu
panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
